channel.title: Weekly Nephrology AI
channel.description: An AI-generated educational podcast reviewing recent nephrology research in clear English.
channel.copyright: © 2026 Weekly Nephrology AI. All rights reserved.

item.title: Weekly Nephrology AI — Deep Read 2026-07-23
item.description:
[Deep Read] Sparsentan vs irbesartan in pediatric FSGS (ages 8 to under 18). A post hoc exploratory subgroup of the phase 3 DUPLEX randomized active-controlled trial. We walk through the design, proteinuria and kidney endpoints, and why the small sample limits it. Educational evidence review in clear English; not medical advice.
Read the transcript: https://weekly-nephrology.github.io/weekly-nephrology-podcast/script/Nephrology_DeepRead_2026-07-23.html
item.content:encoded:
[Deep Read] Sparsentan vs irbesartan in pediatric FSGS (ages 8 to under 18).

A post hoc exploratory subgroup of the phase 3 DUPLEX randomized active-controlled trial.

We walk through the design, proteinuria and kidney endpoints, and why the small sample limits it.

Educational evidence review in clear English; not medical advice.

Read the transcript

item.title: Weekly Nephrology AI — Weekly Summary 2026-07-20
item.description:
[Weekly Summary] Abstract-based review of five recent clinical nephrology studies. Atrasentan phase 3 RCT in IgA nephropathy; finerenone RCT in non-diabetic CKD. Kidney biopsy prognosis in severe ANCA vasculitis; postpartum kidney risk after preeclampsia. Crossover RCT of dapagliflozin in inactive lupus nephritis.
Read the transcript: https://weekly-nephrology.github.io/weekly-nephrology-podcast/script/Weekly_Nephrology_2026-07-20.html
item.content:encoded:
[Weekly Summary] Abstract-based review of five recent clinical nephrology studies.

Atrasentan phase 3 RCT in IgA nephropathy; finerenone RCT in non-diabetic CKD.

Kidney biopsy prognosis in severe ANCA vasculitis; postpartum kidney risk after preeclampsia.

Crossover RCT of dapagliflozin in inactive lupus nephritis.

Read the transcript

item.title: Weekly Nephrology AI — Case Reports 2026-07-18
item.description:
[Case Reports] Four open-access nephrology cases, explained in clear English. From abstracts: renal osteosarcoma, hyperkalemia from timolol drops, and AHL amyloidosis. A full-text deep read of HTRA1 membranous nephropathy with a plasma cell disorder. Each case is a single patient, so we treat it as reasoning, not proof.
Read the transcript: https://weekly-nephrology.github.io/weekly-nephrology-podcast/script/Nephrology_CaseReports_2026-07-18.html
item.content:encoded:
[Case Reports] Four open-access nephrology cases, explained in clear English.

From abstracts: renal osteosarcoma, hyperkalemia from timolol drops, and AHL amyloidosis.

A full-text deep read of HTRA1 membranous nephropathy with a plasma cell disorder.

Each case is a single patient, so we treat it as reasoning, not proof.

Read the transcript
